top_signals.title: Oil prices climb after tanker struck off Saudi Arabia, Trump escalates Iran threats
top_signals.summary: Oil prices rose after U.S. President Donald Trump threatened to bomb Iranian infrastructure in response to any attacks on ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Ebola Deaths Top 1,000 in Congo as Response Trails Fastest-Spreading Outbreak
top_signals.summary: Confirmed Ebola deaths in Democratic Republic of Congo have surpassed 1,000, prompting Africa’s top public health official to warn the outbreak could become one of the worst on record unless transmission is rapidly brought under control.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Policy paper: EM on customs duty on distance imported goods sales (C(2026)2760)
top_signals.summary: The government's summary of a Commission Delegated Regulation as regards elements related to the temporary customs duty on distance sales of imported goods.
